{{header}}
{{row[header]}}
Page {{c.pageNumber}} of {{c.totalPages}}
Disclaimer:
•User ID: Must be mapped to the column identifying the Sales Representative who is the primary owner of the order. This value should uniquely identify the sales user (e.g., Employee ID, Sales Rep ID, or System User ID).
•Transaction Date: Must be mapped to the column containing the Order Date (or equivalent transaction date) associated with the sale. This date is used to determine the applicable incentive period.
Incorrect mapping may result in inaccurate credit assignment and commission calculation.
Target Source
